role: Maximizing Developer Gains @Phantom | SteelCitySolana Organizer | Colosseum Mentor/Angel
description: Public framework-driven judge. Solicited Colosseum projects and gave detailed reply feedback.

main_solicitation_post.content: The way I think about @colosseum projects is that there’s essentially 2 kinds imo — greenfield innovation products vs iterative innovation products...

core_framework: Greenfield (new market, cult members, quality > quantity) vs Iterative (obvious value prop, high-volume customer closes, organic users + feedback loop > airdrop farmers). Evidence of PMF must match category.

key_replies_and_insights.reply: Personally id say this is pretty greenfield!
Spectrum, not binary. Onchain options in the middle. Need organic users + feedback loop + liquidity. Watch for airdrop farmers. Prove compelling vs perps.
Iterative side. Target specific user 'creators'. Go where they hang out, test value prop, iterate despite rejection.

overall_judging_style: Framework-first (greenfield/iterative), heavy emphasis on PMF evidence type, organic traction, user feedback loops, and category-specific metrics. Builder-friendly but rigorous on signals vs noise.
